en-US.description:
Stella is a personal AI assistant for your phone and computer. Ask a question, talk through an idea, or send work to your paired computer while you're away.

Use Stella to:
• Chat with an AI assistant from your phone
• Speak instead of typing with voice input
• Pair with the Stella desktop app and ask your computer to browse, manage files, or run tasks
• Choose Stella models, your own provider keys, Codex, or Claude Code on a paired computer
• Keep chat history and local context on your devices rather than in a cloud message archive

Stella is local-first and open source. Depending on how you use it, message content may pass through Stella's service or the AI provider you select to produce a response, but it isn't stored as cloud chat history. See the privacy policy for details.

Computer control requires the Stella desktop app and a paired computer. What Stella can do depends on your computer, selected model or engine, connected services, and permissions.
en-US.title: Stella: Personal AI
en-US.subtitle: Chat, voice & desktop control

review.notes:
Sign-in is optional. To review without an account, tap 'Continue without signing in,' then complete or skip onboarding and open Chat.

The Computer tab connects to the separately installed Stella desktop app. Pairing uses a one-time code or QR code shown by the desktop app, so computer control is unavailable until a computer is paired.

Chat messages are exchanged with an AI assistant, not with other users. The app has no public feed or public user profiles.
